_comment: Starry Sky (星空) dimension — the inter-planetary void of the Alliance Star System / Brilliant Void Star System / Vermilion Bird Starfield. Canon: when Wang Lin leaves Planet Suzaku, he travels through this starry sky — the vast void between cultivation planets. Cultivators fly through this space (higher realms fly in vacuum; lower realms use teleportation arrays or flying artifacts). Contains void beasts (虚空兽), wandering cultivators, abandoned ancient teleportation arrays, and meteor fields. Uses minecraft:end noise settings (floating islands = asteroids/meteors in the void). 4 biomes mapped by multi_noise. Prime Directive: the starry sky exists objectively — cultivators fly through it whether or not the player is watching. The simulation is tick-based and runs on the server even when no player is present. This is NOT vanilla mob spawning.
